name: Automation & AI
tagline: Automate the repetitive work and answer with AI using your own business data.

packages.name: Automate One
packages.hook: Get that task you do a thousand times off your plate.
packages.problem: Do you copy data from a form into your CRM? Forward emails by hand? Update a spreadsheet every day? I automate that.
deliverables: An automated flow that runs the process on its own (with n8n)
Connections between the tools you already use
Tests so it runs without failures
packages.outcome: You get hours back every week and stop making manual errors.

packages.name: Connected Operations
packages.hook: Get your tools talking to each other.
packages.problem: Your CRM, forms, payments and data live on separate islands. I connect them into a single system that works for you.
deliverables: Several automated flows connecting your whole operation
Integrations with CRM, payment gateways and external APIs
A dashboard to see that everything is working
packages.outcome: Your business runs the repetitive work on its own and you focus on selling.

packages.name: AI Assistant
packages.hook: An assistant that answers with your business data.
packages.problem: It serves your customers, answers frequent questions or finds internal information in seconds, using your own data.
deliverables: Chatbot or assistant connected to your real data (RAG)
Trained on your information, not generic answers
Integrated where you need it (web, WhatsApp, internal)
packages.outcome: You respond faster, serve customers 24/7 and free your team from repetitive work.

faq.q: Which tools do you automate with?
faq.a: Mainly n8n for the flows, plus integrations with your CRM, payments and the APIs you already use.

faq.q: Does the AI assistant use my data?
faq.a: Yes. It connects to your real information (RAG) and answers with it, not generic replies.
